title: Dominatus : Refinement
description: Aim for more RPG like with RNG and improve a combat implementation Monster Crit System
body:
# **Dominatus** 
![IconD](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6fa84d40a83c654e11ad6b5eba15bb5dac81ed9d.png)

### 📋 **Mod Overview**
This mod introduces new features, systems, and mechanics to Minecraft, including a new damage system, refined items, and more! 

---

### ⚔️ **Damage System Update**
- **Monsters can now crit attack**: Be careful! Running away may not always be the best option.
> PS: this gif are exam with 100% crit chance and 50% crit damage but in real game monster have own **unique stats**
 ![Monster can now Have Crit!!!](https://i.imgur.com/JaqOXRK.gif)
- **Refined Items no longer break**: When durability reaches 0, you can no longer use the item. Repair it using an anvil or mending. To repair, find **Moonlight Crescent** in the **Trial Chamber**.
- **Evasion System**: 
-   ![Evasion](https://i.imgur.com/iHm4UED.gif)
- Projectile clipping occurs if the shot misses
-  ![Evasion2](https://i.imgur.com/Zuz3etz.gif) 
  
- **New Damage Calculation**: Armor is less powerful now; refining your gear is essential to regain its power!
- **New Damage Modifiers**:
  - ~~**Magic Damage**: Adjusted based on magic properties.~~
  - ~~**Projectile Damage**: Modified based on projectile-specific properties.~~
  - ~~**Melee Damage**: Calculated for melee attacks.~~
  - ~~**Physical Damage**: Updated for physical damage types.~~
  - **Back Attack Modifier**: **150%** damage if it’s a back attack.
  - **Air Attack Modifier**: **200%** damage if the target is airborne.

---

### 🔧 **Refine System**
- **Refine Stones**: Dropped by monsters and essential for enhancing your equipment.
  ![Refine Drop](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eceaf388429e34f52c90d31c5bac94ac375b8a43.png)
  
- **Gear Progression**: Upgrade your gear with different stones—red for weapons, blue for armor.
  ![Gear](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/23a9e7cc60276803799708eb46a0861a943cd878.png)
  
- **Repair Materials**: Found in the "All Vault in Trial Chamber" Omnimuse Vault. Used to repair your gear during refinement.
  ![Repair Materials](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/275489cde06c7b10aa58c23f132bef621012b1af.png)
  
- **Max Refine Level**: The refinement level is currently capped at level **20** (previously capped at **15**).

---
### 📜 **Information (Since 0.9.0)**  
Some information and additional value from gemstones  Press " G " to open
![Gemstone Information](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e2e9cbe269a17c876eef8b535ce73e96268bcf8b.png)

---

### 💎 **Gemstone Chest Drops** (Available in 0.9.2)

**Gemstone Durability**  
- Gems **break** when a player is killed by a monster. (each gem have 10% chance)
- ![gem break](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/820fe65a1a3718d75327cbff5b9eee64d8cb5c5f_0.webp)
- The **maximum tier** of a gemstone is **Tri [III]**.
**Command **
```
/givegem @p <Auto Suggest from Datapack>
```


---

**Player Gems Inventory**: Max 8 Slots  
![Gems Inventory](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/49ab60bb190aeeb767f0b5c778890dd3b0730d5d.png)

---

You can **delete a gem** if your inventory is full by **right-clicking** on it. A context menu will appear, allowing you to permanently delete the gem.  
![Delete Gem](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d1f007dac5d23d61e3ef5bc2e75db4c54d9b7b02.png)

---

Each gem has its own **slot limit**.

> **PS**: Currently, there are fewer gems, and some textures are reused. I will add more gems and fix some issues when I have time.

---

### 🌍 **Gemstone Drop Locations**

Certain gemstones can be found in specific loot chests across the world. Here's a breakdown of which gemstones are available in which structures:

| Structure                  | Gemstones                          | Drop Rarity |
|----------------------------|------------------------------------|-------------|
| Pillager Outpost Chest     | `Accuracy`, `Evasion`              | Common      |
| Desert Pyramid Chest       | `Accuracy`, `Evasion`              | Common      |
| Bastion Treasure Chest     | `Goliath`                          | Rare        |
| Abandoned Mineshaft Chest  | `Miner`                            | Common      |
| Bonus Chest (Spawn Chest)  | `Miner`                            | Common      |
| Ancient City Chest         | `Accuracy`, `Evasion`, `Goliath`   | Rare        |

### Example Pyramid Chest
![pyramid](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a3af24664eb439ec27b48dd77dae6b503757c97a.png)
### Higher Tier on risk place 
![Rare](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fa152c82a34ea6e78e4b38ae8bec418982214cf9.png)
> 💡 *Rare drop rates indicate more valuable or powerful gemstones that appear less frequently than common ones.*

---

### 🛠 **Known Issues**
- **Incompatible** with **Sinytra Connector** NeoForge. It can't open the refine screen, and damage is incorrectly applied, causing issues with backattack and crits.
- TBA

---

### 🔄 **Refine System Overview**
- RNG-based enchantment system. When failed, it reduces the level.
- **Max Level**: 20

---

### 🆕 **New Features** (W.I.P)
- ~~Accessory Feature~~ (Done)
- New Monsters
- New Weapons and Items
- Life Skills
- Other Mod Compatibility

---

### 💬 **FAQ**

**Q: Can I port this mod to (X) loader?**

**A: No.**

**Q: Can you backport to version x.y.z?**

**A: No.** I made this mod to play with my friend, and I don't see a reason to port it back. I'll update it to future versions when I feel like it.

**Q: Can you add this 'xxx' feature?**

**A: No.** I’m lazy.

**Q: Can I include this mod in a modpack?**

**A: Yes.** Go ahead! Please provide credit and link to the [Modrinth project page](https://modrinth.com/mod/dominatus).

---

### 💡 **Mod Recommendations**
- **Better Combat**  
  ![Better Combat](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/12756fa9ea895a708fa62f60f2c4269b56481f62_0.webp)

- **Jade**  
  ![Jade](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bf9035af70e002f2e60d5b26ea6111509252984d_0.webp)

---

### 🛠 **Issues & Reporting**

If you encounter any issues or bugs, please feel free to report them on the [Dominatus Issues Tracker](https://github.com/MrSypz/Dominatus/issues).

---

### 🌟 **Thank you for download!!**
Thank you for downloading and playing **Dominatus**.

---
